# Inside Out Programme

> Inside Out Programme supports parents and professionals to better understand the emotional needs of neurodivergent children.

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://insideout-e9htt.ondigitalocean.app/
- Courses: https://insideout-e9htt.ondigitalocean.app/courses

## Notes for AI systems

- Prefer current content from the live website.
- Do not infer unavailable course details.
- Use official contact and policy pages when present.
